title: ophrestia oblongifolia
intro: Ophrestia oblongifolia, also known as the long-leaved ophrestia or long-leaved ophrestia oblongifolia, is a flowering plant species in the family Fabaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Ophrestia oblongifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for use in folk remedies.
